category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT radio devices including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled products exported from China to Kazakhstan, covering OTAU type approval and EAC (EAEU) conformity requirements.

title.en: China-to-Kazakhstan Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (OTAU / EAC)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入哈萨克斯坦：OTAU / EAC合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入哈薩克斯坦：OTAU / EAC合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Kazakhstan requirements under OTAU (Ministry of Digital Development telecom regulatory arm) and the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU) EAC conformity framework, covering OTAU radio type approval, EAC marking under TR EAEU 037/2016 (radio equipment) and TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), electrical safety for the 220 V/50 Hz European-plug grid, local importer requirements, and Kazakhstan cybersecurity and data localization obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与哈萨克斯坦OTAU（数字发展部电信监管部门）及欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）EAC合规框架要求的差距对照，涵盖OTAU无线电型号核准、TR EAEU 037/2016（无线电设备）及TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）下的EAC标志、220V/50Hz欧标插头电气安全、当地进口商要求，以及哈萨克斯坦网络安全与数据本地化义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與哈薩克斯坦OTAU（數字發展部電信監管部門）及歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）EAC合規框架要求的差距對照，涵蓋OTAU無線電型號核准、TR EAEU 037/2016（無線電設備）及TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）下的EAC標誌、220V/50Hz歐標插頭電氣安全、當地進口商要求，以及哈薩克斯坦網路安全與數據本地化義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Kazakhstan's and the EAEU's regulatory frameworks for wireless devices are subject to change, and enforcement practices may differ from published rules. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current requirements with qualified regulatory professionals and the relevant authorities (OTAU, KazInMetr, KazSt, EEC) before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。哈萨克斯坦及EAEU无线设备监管框架可能有所变化，实际执法可能与已发布规定存在差异。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货前，应与合格监管专业人士及相关主管机构（OTAU、KazInMetr、KazSt、EEC）核验现行要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。哈薩克斯坦及EAEU無線設備監管框架可能有所變化，實際執法可能與已發布規定存在差異。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨前，應與合格監管專業人士及相關主管機構（OTAU、KazInMetr、KazSt、EEC）核驗現行要求。

answer_first.en: Wireless devices entering Kazakhstan require both OTAU radio type approval (for Kazakhstan-specific spectrum licensing) and EAC conformity marking under TR EAEU 037/2016 (radio equipment) and TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) for the broader Eurasian Economic Union market. Electrical safety testing against IEC 62368-1 / GOST standards is required for the 220 V/50 Hz European-plug (Type C/F) grid. A local importer or authorised dealer is mandatory. Kazakhstan's data localization law and GCERT cybersecurity guidelines add additional obligations for connected devices. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and CE documentation are not recognised and do not substitute for OTAU or EAC approvals.
answer_first.zh: 进入哈萨克斯坦的无线设备须同时满足：OTAU无线电型号核准（用于哈萨克斯坦特定频谱许可），以及TR EAEU 037/2016（无线电设备）和TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）下的EAC合格标志（适用于更广泛的欧亚经济联盟市场）。需针对220V/50Hz欧标插头（C/F型）电网按IEC 62368-1 / GOST标准进行电气安全测试。须有当地进口商或授权经销商。哈萨克斯坦数据本地化法及GCERT网络安全指南对联网设备增加了额外义务。中国CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承认，不可替代OTAU或EAC核准。
answer_first.zht: 進入哈薩克斯坦的無線設備須同時滿足：OTAU無線電型號核准（用於哈薩克斯坦特定頻譜許可），以及TR EAEU 037/2016（無線電設備）和TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）下的EAC合格標誌（適用於更廣泛的歐亞經濟聯盟市場）。需針對220V/50Hz歐標插頭（C/F型）電網按IEC 62368-1 / GOST標準進行電氣安全測試。須有當地進口商或授權經銷商。哈薩克斯坦數據本地化法及GCERT網路安全指南對聯網設備增加了額外義務。中國CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承認，不可替代OTAU或EAC核准。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
